title: Movie DB site with dynamic URLs & path converters

source.module: Core Django fundamentals - Views and URLs

topicTags: Core Django fundamentals - Views and URLs

content.problemStatement:
In this worked-out example, we will keep our focus specifically on path converters.

### How does this code work?
Note that the following URL pattern expects two values in the URL. \
Both values are passed as keyword arguments to the movie_detail() view.
   -  — an integer like 42
   -  — a slug, which typically looks like the-dark-knight

```python
urlpatterns = [
    path('movie///', views.movie_detail, name='movie_detail'),
]
```

If you 'Run' the code and update the URL to `movie/42/dark-knight` - the page will display
